english: What is the primary reason why the path of totality during a solar eclipse is usually about 100 miles wide in India, unlike other parts of the world where it can be much narrower?
hindi: भारत में सूर्य ग्रहण के दौरान टोटलिटी का मार्ग आमतौर पर 100 मील चौड़ा क्यों होता है, जबकि दुनिया के अन्य हिस्सों में यह बहुत संकरा हो सकता है?
tamil: இந்தியாவில் சூரிய கிரகணம் தொடர்ச்சியாக ஏறக்குறைய 100 மைல் அகலமாக இருக்கும் அதன் முக்கிய காரணம் என்ன?
vietnamese: Lý do chính tại sao đường đi của độ che khuất trong thời kỳ nhật thực ở Ấn Độ thường rộng khoảng 100 dặm, không giống như các phần khác của thế giới nơi nó có thể hẹp hơn?
correct_answer: The Moon's shadow has a larger diameter when it falls on the Earth's surface at a point closer to the equator, resulting in a wider path of totality. India's geographical location near the equator contributes to this phenomenon.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by either providing an incorrect scientific explanation or refusing to answer due to lack of specific knowledge about solar eclipses in the Indian context.
